articles.title: Egg lovers can’t get a break. Vital Farms to raise prices because of tariffs.
articles.summary: Vital Farms, a major producer of pasture-raised eggs, announced it will raise egg prices by at least 10% for its retail partners like Target, Kroger, and Whole Foods starting in May. This price hike is attributed to the impact of tariffs, following previous price increases due to the avian flu outbreak.

articles.title: Target CEO rakes in $20.4M as boycott deepens and Black leaders demand accountability
articles.summary: Target CEO Brian Cornell received a $20.4 million pay package last year, a 6.3% increase, amidst a deepening boycott by Black leaders and activists. The boycott stems from Target's rollback of its diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) commitments, including a highly publicized $2 billion pledge to support Black-owned businesses. Activists are demanding accountability as Target's stock price drops and its responses to community concerns are perceived as insufficient.

articles.title: These spring picks are stylist-approved! An 83% Vera Bradley discount, 'sailor' jeans, more
articles.summary: Style expert Jasmine Snow shared her top affordable spring fashion picks from Target, highlighting versatile clothing items and accessories. The recommendations include a discounted Vera Bradley bag, "sailor" jeans, raffia mules, and elevated men's pieces, all aimed at refreshing wardrobes for the season without breaking the bank. The article details where to purchase these items and their key features.
